summary: totalaud.io shipped a major feature sprint covering mobile redesign, beta access controls, streaming CSV import, and artist-focused landing page updates. chrisscho.uk got portfolio polish with mobile nav, responsive images, and an AI Workflow Audit offer page. Minor releases and fixes across audx and tap-cli.

highlights.text: Completed roadmap items for streaming stats CSV import and Gmail pitch sending, plus shipped app-level beta access guard and mobile-first workspace redesign.
Added mobile navigation, fixed responsive image sizing, and launched AI Workflow Audit offer targeting owner-run music businesses with 7+ hours weekly time savings.
Released correctness fixes and cross-platform path handling.
Migrated all commands to REST v1 API in v0.3.1.
